meaning: vt.使成整体,使一体化,求...的积分v.结合
examples: He didn't integrate successfully into the Italian way of life.
They have not made any effort to integrate with the local community.
The strategy is to integrate the development of these cities for a better economic structure.
At the same time, Singleton is looking to integrate the Internet into his grand scheme.
Thomas Msingana insists that it is more about cultural grounding than a conscious decision not to integrate.
